name: Etsy sellers processing 5–15 invoices/month tool
description: For Etsy sellers processing 5–15 invoices/month, manual approval delays cause late orders. We automate purchase order approvals instead of manual approval processes via email or spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Delays in order fulfillment due to manual purchase order approvals.
features: Simple user interface for manual order entry
